projectDescription: A comprehensive Python SDK for financial market data, technical analysis, visualization, and machine learning — built for quantitative research in Jupyter notebooks and Python scripts.
keyFeatures: Multi-asset market data (stocks, crypto, forex, futures, indices)
Company fundamentals: financials, earnings, filings, profiles, insiders
25+ technical analysis indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Ichimoku, etc.)
Interactive Plotly charting via the visualize module
ML forecasting with linear regression, multi-linear regression, beta, and LSTM
Data utilities for DataFrame manipulation, concurrency, caching, and date handling
Economic calendar and FRED-style dataset search
Sentiment, ESG, credit ratings, and supply chain data
publicApiSurface: client.profiles.profile / info / statistics / summary / recommendation / calendar
client.insiders.individuals / institutions / funds / ownership / transactions / activity
ta.sma / ema / dema / ssma / trima / kama
ta.rsi / macd / roc / mom / cmo / stochastic_oscillator / williams_r / adx
visualize.candles / line / bar / barh / scatter / fit / area / pie / radar / heatmap / cov / polls / spread / tree / graph
utils.df / pds / stack / stitch / snap / filter / resample
utils.relativity / indexed / composite / contrast / compare / gainers / losers / overlap / difference
